name: Sri Aurobindo Ashram
description: A highly revered spiritual community founded by the Indian freedom fighter and philosopher, Sri Aurobindo, in 1926. It is one of the most visited ashrams in India.
history: Sri Aurobindo retreated here after leaving politics, focusing entirely on spiritual evolution and 'Integral Yoga'.
famousFor: Samadhi (tomb) of Sri Aurobindo and The Mother.
